introSection: Alien is a roller coaster at Dalmaland Fun Park in Biograd Na Moure, Zadar, Croatia. This is a red spinning coaster arranged with 4 cars, each of them has 4 seats. This ride opened in 15. july 2017, and has been operating since.
fullText:
Alien is a roller coaster at Dalmaland Fun Park in Biograd Na Moure, Zadar, Croatia. This is a red spinning coaster arranged with 4 cars, each of them has 4 seats. This ride opened in 15. july 2017, and has been operating since.

Red track, grey supports.
